pi_items.source: setup_task.sh line 20 creates this file with JSON requirements data
setup_task.sh line 16 and export_result.sh line 12 reference this output path

Task structure requires: Introduction, Functional Requirements, Non-Functional Requirements, Use Cases, External Interfaces, Data Dictionary, Conclusion (7 main H1 sections). Verified from task.json description and structure requirements.

Data contains: 12 functional requirements + 4 use cases + 3 interfaces + 8 data entities + subsections of Introduction/NFR = 27+ H2 subsections possible. setup_task.sh lines 31-42 show 12 functional requirements, lines 53-56 show 4 use cases, lines 59-61 show 3 interfaces.
Data Dictionary contains 8 entities (Patient, Provider, Appointment, Location, InsurancePlan, WaitlistEntry, RecurringSchedule, AuditRecord) at lines 63-71, each with potential H3 grouping

Task explicitly requires 4 tables: (1) Functional Requirements Table, (2) Use Cases table, (3) External Interfaces table, (4) Data Dictionary table. Task.json description lines state these explicitly.
Total table rows: 12 functional requirements + 4 use cases + 3 interfaces + 8 data entities = 27 rows total. Verified from setup_task.sh JSON data at lines 31-71.
setup_task.sh line 46: Non-functional requirement REQ-NF-002 contains 'HIPAA compliant encryption (AES-256) at rest.'
setup_task.sh line 59: External interface IF-001 has protocol 'FHIR R4' for EHR Integration
setup_task.sh: Term appears throughout - line 28 (module name), line 31 (REQ-F-001), line 33 (REQ-F-003), and many other places. Also in data dictionary at line 66.

setup_task.sh JSON data (lines 20-73) does NOT contain the word 'Pinnacle'. The data uses company code 'PHS' (line 23: document id 'PHS-SRS-APT-2024-001') but never spells out 'Pinnacle Health Systems'. The task.json description (line 5) mentions 'Pinnacle Health Systems' but this is external to the actual requirements data that the agent must use.
setup_task.sh lines 31-42: REQ-F-001 through REQ-F-012 (12 total)
setup_task.sh lines 53-56: UC-001 through UC-004 (4 total)
setup_task.sh lines 59-61: IF-001 through IF-003 (3 total)
setup_task.sh lines 63-71: Patient, Provider, Appointment, Location, InsurancePlan, WaitlistEntry, RecurringSchedule, AuditRecord (8 total)

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating an IEEE 830-compliant SRS document for an Appointment Scheduling Module. The synthetic input data contains 12 functional requirements (REQ-F-001 through REQ-F-012), 6 non-functional requirements, 4 use cases (UC-001 through UC-004), 3 external interfaces (IF-001: FHIR R4, IF-002: X12 270/271, IF-003: REST API), and 8 data dictionary entities. The data includes HIPAA and FHIR terminology. The document must include at least 7 H1 sections, 10 H2 subsections, 4 H3 groups, 4 tables with minimum 20 total rows. All required IDs (REQ-F-001, REQ-F-012, UC-001, IF-001) are present in the source data. Term 'Pinnacle' does not appear in the synthetic requirements data itself, though referenced in task description.
